entry.title: IDC W56HZV09D0024 (P00175) awarded to OSHKOSH DEFENSE, LLC, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION P00175 TO CONTRACT W56HZV-09-D-0024 IS TO INCORPRATE THE NON-CONFORMING TANKER PUMP AND DRAG LINK TORQUE AGREEMENTS.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC W56HZV09D0024 (P00176) awarded to OSHKOSH DEFENSE, LLC, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: MODIFICATION P00176 TO FAMILY OF HEAVY TACTICAL VEHICLES CONTRACT W56HZV-09-D-0024 IS ISSUED TO FORMALLY INCORPORATE THE AGREEMENT MADE BETWEEN OSHKOSH AND THE GOVERNMENT TO INCORPORATE 81 EA GOVERNMENT FURNISHED EQUIPMENT (GFE) 2500 GALLON TANKS INTO THE HEAVY EXPANDED MOBILITY TACTICAL TRUCK (HEMTT) M978A4 RECAP PRODUCTION LINE. THIS AGREEMENT RESULTS IN A CREDIT AMOUNT OWED THE GOVERNMENT THAT WILL BE RECOVERED UNDER MODIFICATIONS TO DELIVERY ORDERS 0086 AND 0096.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC W56HZV09D0024 (P00177) awarded to OSHKOSH DEFENSE, LLC, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO INCORPORATE A NO COST ECP.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC W56HZV09D0024 (P00178) awarded to OSHKOSH DEFENSE, LLC, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: MODIFICATION P00178 TO FAMILY OF HEAVY TACTICAL VEHICLES (FHTV) CONTRACT W56HZV-09-D-0024 IS ISSUED TO FORMALLY INCORPORATE THE HEAVY EQUIPMENT TRANSPORTER (HETA1) FLEX PLATE FIELD INSPECTION AND RE-TORQUE AGREEMENT BETWEEN THE GOVERNMENT AND OSHKOSH DEFENSE, LLC. THIS MODIFICATION ALSO CAPTURES THE CONSIDERATION AGREEMENT MADE FOR DELIVERY SCHEDULE DELAYS CAUSED BY THE FLEX PLATE QUALITY ISSUE.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC W56HZV09D0024 (P00179) awarded to OSHKOSH DEFENSE, LLC, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: MODIFICATION P00179 TO FAMILY OF HEAVY TACTICAL VEHICLES CONTRACT W56HZV-09-D-0024 IS BEING ISSUED TO FORMALLY INCORPORATE THE CONSIDERATION AGREEMENT MADE BETWEEN OSHKOSH DEFENSE, LLC AND THE GOVERNMENT FOR LATE DELIVERIES OF VEHICLES ON DELIVERY ORDERS 25, 86, 87, 93, 96, 97 AND 98.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC W56HZV09D0024 (P00180) awarded to OSHKOSH DEFENSE, LLC, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THIS IS A MODIFICATION TO INCORPORATE NO COST ECPS.
